layout.layout_rhythm: long-table: medium density, medium formality. Warm cream and rust-red supper-club aesthetic with bold uppercase grotesk headlines, Fraunces serifs, and pill-shaped outlined buttons.

template_json_typography.style: bold uppercase Bricolage Grotesque for hero / chapter titles paired with Fraunces for body, captions, button labels, and tagline — a contemporary mix-and-match modern editorial pairing

design_tokens_typography.style: bold uppercase Bricolage Grotesque for hero / chapter titles paired with Fraunces for body, captions, button labels, and tagline — a contemporary mix-and-match modern editorial pairing

typography.typography_role: bold uppercase Bricolage Grotesque for hero / chapter titles paired with Fraunces for body, captions, button labels, and tagline — a contemporary mix-and-match modern editorial pairing

cjk_policy.known_degradation: The Fraunces italic-default body voice is one of Long Table's most distinctive typographic moves in Latin — italic Mincho-style serif body that gives the system its lyrical, hand-written warmth. Chinese has no equivalent: there is no commonly-available "italic Mincho" face on the Google Fonts CDN, and slanted Han glyphs read as broken regardless. The Chinese

template_json_palette.description: warm buttery-cream paper with one strict rust-red / terracotta ink used for type, pill borders, and outlined info cards — strictly bichromatic, very social-media friendly

image.strategy: Preserve source image regions and screenshot-backed composition; runtime generation must use traceable online/approved image assets, not local decorative placeholders.

font_and_typography_constraints: italic is source-aware but CJK fake italic is forbidden; use color/weight fallback when unavailable
letter spacing is preserved for Latin labels and reset/softened for CJK

extraction_receipt.claim_boundary: visual contract only; not a renderer implementation or fidelity pass

display.mapping_reason: 保留 Bricolage Grotesque 的语义角色，但运行时优先使用 Slide/系统可用的 Source Sans Pro 与 思源黑体。

body.mapping_reason: 保留 Fraunces 的语义角色，但运行时优先使用 Slide/系统可用的 Source Sans Pro 与 思源黑体。

label.mapping_reason: 保留 Bricolage Grotesque 的语义角色，但运行时优先使用 Slide/系统可用的 Source Sans Pro 与 思源黑体。

metric.mapping_reason: 保留 Bricolage Grotesque 的语义角色，但运行时优先使用 Slide/系统可用的 Source Sans Pro 与 思源黑体。

font_strategy.mapping_reason: 根据 design.md/template.html/template.json 中的 font-family 与 typography token 提取源字体；运行时按 Slide/系统/Adobe/思源可用字体降级。
font_strategy.same_role_font_justification: 源模板本身以单一 sans/system family 承担多数字体角色；通过 weight/size/line-height/uppercase 区分 display/body/label/metric。

italic.source_usage: source uses italic/font-style or italic-family tokens
italic.fallback_when_unavailable: use color_shift or weight_shift; do not fake CJK italic
italic.loss_notes: Satori/Slide may not provide exact Google italic face; record as visual approximation.

underline.source_usage: source uses underline/text-decoration or hairline emphasis
underline.mapped_decoration: native underline only for actual text-decoration source usage
underline.fallback_shape: 1px-3px rule or border accent when underline font rendering is unavailable

line_through.source_usage: not present in source; default no line-through

emphasis.color_shift: use source accent color roles only
emphasis.font_family_switch: only switch between mapped display/body/label/metric roles from this family
emphasis.weight_shift: increase one role step within font_weight_scale
emphasis.style_shift: italic only when source_usage requires and CJK fallback is safe

text_decoration_policy.underline.color.raw_value: dy voice — using a non-opsz fallback face flattens the quality at small sizes. Underline is not used. italic.raw_value: 400–600 with optical-size axis engaged.
